docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-03-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$102.50) SERVED FEB-15-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COX, ZACK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-02-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOLINDA JACKSON. DEFENDANT ZACK COX IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT WHEREIN DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $176.00 BY THE 25TH OF EACH MONTH. PAYMENTS WILL BEGIN 5/24 AND CONTIUE FOR 15 MONTHS UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $2639.50 IS PAID IN FULL. A PROGRESS REPORT WILL BE SCHEDULED EVERY 5 MONTHS. IF PAYMENTS ARE BEING MADE, NO APPEARANCE IS NECESSARY. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE 15 MONTH PROGRESS REPORT DATE IN 8/25, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,537.00 FILED BY CCSF TTX AS TO DEFENDANT COX, ZACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CCSF TTX COX, ZACK
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SARAH HEYWORTH FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-04-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZACK COX IS NOT PRESENT. IF NO APPEARANCE ON AUGUST 4, 2025 THE MATTER WILL DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZACK COX IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: TAMILA IPEMA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
